headline: Netflix Co-CEO Hastings: 'Thank God We're Done With Shrinking Quarters'
summary: Netflix Inc (NASDAQ: NFLX) Co-CEO Reed Hastings expressed his relief with the streaming giant snapping its run of receding quarterly numbers on Tuesday.

headline: Elon Musk Tweets: SpaceX is losing ~$20M/month due to unpaid service & costs related to enhanced security measures for cyberwar defense, but we'll keep doing it (sigh).
Elon Musk Tweets Reply on Starlink: No money from DoD, but several other countries, orgs & individuals are paying for ~11k/25k terminals (thanks!)
